            primes.push(i);
            mu[i] = -1;
        }
        for (const p of primes) {

            if (p === lp[i]) {

// GCD function
function gcd(a, b) {
    while (b) {
        [a, b] = [b, a % b];
    }
    return a;
}

// Sieve for Mobius function
function mobiusSieve(limit) {
    const mu = new Array(limit + 1).fill(0);
    const lp = new Array(limit + 1).fill(0);
    const primes = [];
    mu[1] = 1;

    for (let i = 2; i <= limit; i++) {
        if (lp[i] === 0) {
            lp[i] = i;
            primes.push(i);
            mu[i] = -1;
        }
        for (const p of primes) {
            if (p > lp[i] || i * p > limit) break;
            lp[i * p] = p;
            if (p === lp[i]) {
                mu[i * p] = 0;
            } else {
                mu[i * p] = -mu[i];
            }
        }
    }
    return mu;
}

function solve(nums, p, queries) {
    const N = nums.length;
    const V_MAX = 50000;
    
    // Determine the maximum possible value for the transformed numbers
    // Since P >= 1, V_MAX' <= 50000.
    const limit = Math.floor(V_MAX / p);

    const mu = mobiusSieve(limit);
    
    // C[g]: Count of elements in nums' divisible by g
    const C = new Array(limit + 1).fill(0);
    
    // S: Summation value for Mobius inversion, representing number of coprime pairs
    let S = 0;
    
    // has_one: Tracks if P appears in nums
    let has_one = false;

    // Helper to update S when C[g] changes by delta
    // delta = +1 (element enters set) or -1 (element leaves set)
    const update_S = (g, delta) => {
        const C_old = C[g];
        const C_new = C_old + delta;

        // Contribution of g to S is mu[g] * C(C[g], 2)
        // C(n, 2) = n*(n-1)/2
        
        // Old contribution
        let old_contrib = 0;
        if (C_old >= 2) {
            old_contrib = mu[g] * (C_old * (C_old - 1) / 2);
        }

        // New contribution
        let new_contrib = 0;
        if (C_new >= 2) {
            new_contrib = mu[g] * (C_new * (C_new - 1) / 2);
        }
        
        S = S - old_contrib + new_contrib;
    };

    // --- Initialization ---
    
    // Keep track of which values are currently in nums' for efficient removal tracking during updates
    // Since nums[i] is up to 50000, and P >= 1, nums'[i] is up to 50000.
    const current_nums_prime = new Array(N);
    
    for (let i = 0; i < N; i++) {
        const val = nums[i];
        if (val % p === 0) {
            const val_prime = val / p;
            current_nums_prime[i] = val_prime;
            
            if (val_prime === 1) {
                has_one = true;
            }
            
            // Update C[g] and S based on val_prime entering the set
            const divisors = [];

                    divisors.push(g);
                    if (g * g !== val_prime) {
                        divisors.push(val_prime / g);
                    }
                }

            for (const g of divisors) {
                C[g]++;
                update_S(g, 1);
            }

            current_nums_prime[i] = -1; // Sentinel value for not divisible by P

                    if (g * g !== old_prime) {

                    }

                update_S(g, -1);
